scripts.vfs:prepare-mocks: cd crates/vfs && wasm32-wasip1-clang++ --target=wasm32-wasip1 -o llvm_mock.wasm mock_llvm.cpp -mthread-model single -mno-atomics -mno-bulk-memory && cargo build --target wasm32-wasip1-threads -p rustc_mock_crate -p vfs-shell -r && cp ../../target/wasm32-wasip1-threads/release/rustc_mock_crate.wasm ./rustc_mock.wasm && cp ../../target/wasm32-wasip1-threads/release/vfs-shell.wasm ./vfs_shell.wasm
scripts.vfs:build: wasi_virt_layer build -p vfs crates/vfs/llvm_opt.wasm crates/vfs/rustc_opt.wasm crates/vfs/lsp_opt.wasm crates/vfs/cargo_opt.wasm vfs-shell --dev --own-memory && node -e "const fs=require('fs'); fs.rmSync('page/src/worker_process/vfs_bindings', {recursive:true, force:true}); fs.mkdirSync('page/src/worker_process/vfs_bindings', {recursive:true}); fs.cpSync('dist', 'page/src/worker_process/vfs_bindings', {recursive:true})" && git restore page/src/worker_process/vfs_bindings/inst.ts && cd page/src/worker_process/vfs_bindings && bun i
scripts.vfs:build-debug: wasi_virt_layer build -p vfs --features debugging crates/vfs/llvm_opt.wasm crates/vfs/rustc_opt.wasm crates/vfs/lsp_opt.wasm crates/vfs/cargo_opt.wasm vfs-shell --dev --own-memory && node -e "const fs=require('fs'); fs.rmSync('page/src/worker_process/vfs_bindings', {recursive:true, force:true}); fs.mkdirSync('page/src/worker_process/vfs_bindings', {recursive:true}); fs.cpSync('dist', 'page/src/worker_process/vfs_bindings', {recursive:true})" && git restore page/src/worker_process/vfs_bindings/inst.ts && cd page/src/worker_process/vfs_bindings && bun i
scripts.vfs:clean: cd crates/vfs && rm -rf dist target llvm_mock.wasm rustc_mock.wasm
scripts.build: bun run vfs:build && bun run --cwd lib build && bun run --cwd page build
